name: multi-agent-workflows
description: Parallel and subagent-driven execution workflows for Codex with plugin-level multi-agent roles.

interface.longDescription: A standalone Codex plugin for multi-agent work. It bundles a unified coordination skill for parallel investigation and subagent-driven execution, plus dedicated implementer, spec-review, and task-review agents.
defaultPrompt: Use subagent-driven development for this plan
Split these independent failures across parallel agents
Run this implementation through a multi-agent workflow
